tasks.label: poface: stop stale api
tasks.command: $targets = Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_Process | Where-Object { (($_.Name -eq 'dotnet.exe') -or ($_.Name -eq 'PoFace.Api.exe')) -and $_.CommandLine -match 'PoFace.Api' }; if ($targets) { $targets | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force } }
